name: clibridge
description: Route Claude Dynamic Workflow agent calls to local coding CLIs through a structured MCP bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Route Claude workflows to local coding CLIs
interface.longDescription: Use CLI Bridge to design, test, and operate a local MCP broker that routes Claude Dynamic Workflow agent work to Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, or Claude through validated provider adapters.
defaultPrompt: Use the workflow CLI bridge in this repo
Plan a Claude workflow adapter route
